overview.short: Vikatgad / Peb Fort is a fort located 19 km (12 mi) from Karjat, in Raigad district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Vikatgad / Peb Fort is a fort located 19 km (12 mi) from Karjat, in Raigad district, of Maharashtra. This fort is in continuation with the Malang gad, Tauli Hill and Chanderi fort of the Matheran Hill Range. Vikatgad is a favourite destination for one-day trekkers. The trek path to Vikatgad is along deep ravines and cliffs.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kalamb Karjat
topPlaces.description: Kalamb is a town in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Kalamb Gram Panchayat, Karjat, Raigad, Village of a Karjat Taluka, Raigad district which is well connected to Panvel, Mumbai, Thane and Pune, Karjat, Neral, India Kalamb along with Karjat is also known as Eastern Mumbai District.

topPlaces.name: Neral, India
topPlaces.description: Neral is a town in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is 83 km+ developing city of Raigad district which is well connected to Panvel, Mumbai, Thane and Pune.

topPlaces.name: Matheran
topPlaces.description: Matheran (Pronunciation: [maːt̪ʰeɾaːn]) is a partially automobile free hill station and a municipal council in the Karjat taluka of the Raigad district located in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Matheran is part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, and one of the smallest hill stations in India.

topPlaces.name: Saguna Baug
topPlaces.description: Saguna Baug is an agritourism centre and adventure park located in Neral, Raigarh, established in 1985. Saguna Baug Agri Tourism was given award for Rural Tourism on September 27, 2022 by Government of India on World Tourism Day .

topPlaces.name: Shelu
topPlaces.description: Shelu is a town in Karjat Tehsil, Maharashtra, India. It also has a station on the Mumbai Suburban Railway in Raigad district.

topPlaces.name: Poshir
topPlaces.description: Poshir is a village near the city of Neral, in the state of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Vangani
topPlaces.description: Vangani is a town in Maharashtra, India near the city of Mumbai. It is serviced by the Vangani railway station on the Central Line of the Mumbai Suburban Railway on the Mumbai-Karjat route and the MH SH 43 Highway which connects it with the Suburban Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Kalavantin Durg
topPlaces.description: Kalavantin Durg is a 2,250 ft (686 m) high summit located in the Western Ghats, near the Prabalgad fort in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is also known as Kelve Teen, Kalavantinicha Sulka, or Kalavantin Pinnacle; alternative transliterations include Kalawantin, Kalavati, and Kalavanti.

items.note: Kalamb is a town in Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Saguna Baug is an agritourism centre and adventure park located in Neral, Raigarh, established in 1985. Saguna Baug Agri Tourism was given award for Rural Tourism on September 27, 2022 by Government of India on World Tourism Day .

Kalavantin Durg is a 2,250 ft (686 m) high summit located in the Western Ghats, near the Prabalgad fort in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is also known as Kelve Teen, Kalavantinicha Sulka, or Kalavantin Pinnacle; alternative transliterations include Kalawantin, Kalavati, and Kalavanti.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vikatgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vikatgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (28 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vikatgad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vikatgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vikatgad?
faq.a: Stays in Vikatgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vikatgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalamb Karjat, Neral, India, Matheran, Saguna Baug, Shelu.
